title: OrganiGram Holdings Inc (OGI) Stock Forecast & Price Target - Investing.com
text: OrganiGram Holdings Inc (OGI) Stock Forecast and Consensus Estimates from Investing.com. Consensus Analysis: Investing.com aggregates consensus estimates from multiple research analysts covering OGI. EPS Forecasts: Earnings per share forecasts are provided for upcoming quarters and full-year periods. Revenue Estimates: Revenue consensus estimates are compiled from analyst research reports. Price Target: The average analyst price target is calculated from individual analyst price forecasts. Rating Distribution: The distribution of buy, hold, and sell ratings from analysts is displayed. Recommendation Trends: Historical trends in analyst recommendations are tracked over time. Estimate Revisions: Changes to earnings and revenue estimates are tracked to identify shifting analyst sentiment. Beat/Miss Rates: Historical performance versus analyst estimates is documented. Valuation Metrics: Various valuation multiples are calculated based on consensus estimates.
